items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for timing options.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the timing options (immediate, 1 hour, 24 hours, custom) as part of the requirement. However, the provided evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the availability of these timing options. Without this specific evidence, it is impossible to determine if the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap.
